category_sources: source_facts.description says sshuttle is a proxy server that works as a poor man's VPN.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives sshuttle; source_facts.homepage is the official sshuttle GitHub project.
docs_sources: Official sshuttle project uses Read the Docs for dedicated documentation; source_facts.homepage provides the official repository README.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; source_facts.repo is empty, so it is returned as the repo.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies proxy/VPN behavior; source_facts.executables lists sshuttle.
